Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's dashboard reveals two fundamentally different momentum narratives. ADTTF dominates the rankings with a score of 93.7 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary long-term returns (8,751% over 10 years, 663% over 5 years) combined with consistent acceleration across all timeframes and strong positioning above all major moving averages. In stark contrast, ATEX shows violent short-term outperformance (368% in 6 months, 332% in 1 year) but concerning deceleration signals, with the ratio_5y_1y at just 0.23 indicating the 5-year return failed to keep pace with the 1-year surge, suggesting momentum may be fading rather than building. While ADTTF exhibits stable outperformance versus SPY, QQQ, and gold across all timeframes, ATEX displays erratic relative performance with a negative 5-year return versus QQQ (-25.92%) despite exceptional recent gains, raising questions about sustainability. The data suggests ADTTF represents established secular strength while ATEX represents a volatile spike that may reflect sector-specific or cyclical strength rather than durable momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
